strings.關閉可減少背景上傳佔頻寬；需管理員。: Turning off can reduce the bandwidth occupied by background uploads; an administrator is required.
strings.關閉可減少開始功能表與系統通知的推薦內容。: Turning off reduces recommended content on the start menu and system notifications.
strings.關閉可減少開始搜尋列的推薦與新聞內容。: Turn off to reduce recommendations and news content in the Start search bar.
strings.關閉可讓關機更徹底；變更需管理員權限。: Close allows for a more complete shutdown; changes require administrator privileges.

strings.關閉選單／視窗動畫可略為提升反應速度。: Turning off menu/window animation can slightly improve response speed.
strings.限制後未使用中的 UWP／商店應用較少佔用 CPU 與網路。: After restriction, unused UWP/Store apps occupy less CPU and network.

strings.除錯舊當機時可能缺少傾印: Bug fix for possible missing dumps on old crashes
strings.除錯需要外可停用。: Can be disabled except when required for debugging.
strings.雙擊本列可停用開機啟動；或取消右側「開機」勾選。: Double-click this column to disable startup; or uncheck "Start" on the right.
strings.雙擊本列可啟用開機啟動；或勾選右側「開機」。: Double-click this column to enable startup; or check "Start" on the right.
strings.離線內容可能需重新下載: Offline content may need to be re-downloaded
strings.離線歌曲可能需重新下載: Offline songs may need to be re-downloaded
strings.離線歌曲需重新下載: Offline songs need to be downloaded again
strings.雲端/WSL/.NET 靜態路徑 + LocalAppData / Progra: Cloud/WSL/.NET static path + LocalAppData/ProgramData dynamic discovery
strings.電源節流設定需管理員權限: Power throttling settings require administrator privileges
strings.需管理員權限效果較佳；部分路徑可能不存在: Administrator rights are required for better results; some paths may not exist
strings.需要以管理員執行 defrag: Need to execute defrag as administrator
strings.靜態優先；動態掃描 Local 與 ProgramData，依實測大小排序取前: Static priority; dynamically scan Local and ProgramData, and sort the top N items according to the measured size.
strings.靜態常見 %APPDATA% 路徑 + 擴大關鍵字/候選池的動態發現: Static common %APPDATA% paths + dynamic discovery to expand keyword/candidate pool
strings.靜態路徑 + 依大小排序動態掃描 %APPDATA% 快取: Static path + dynamic scanning %APPDATA% cache sorted by size
strings.頂部溫度未解析：請看下方 ID 194/190 屬性（部分 USB 橋接把溫度放: The top temperature is not resolved: please see the ID 194/190 attribute below (some USB bridges put the temperature in the "current value" instead of the original value)
strings.預故障（Pre-failure）：廠商標記為「可能預示故障」的屬性。: Pre-failure: Attributes marked by the manufacturer as "possibly indicating failure".
strings.預設僅 daemon 日誌；caches 預設關閉，刪除會迫使重新下載依賴: The default is only daemon logs; caches are turned off by default, and deletion will force dependencies to be re-downloaded.
strings.預設僅 pnpm cache；store prune 預設關閉，執行後各專案需重: The default is only pnpm cache; store prune is turned off by default, and each project needs to be reinstalled after execution.
strings.預設僅 v3/HTTP 快取；packages 目錄預設關閉，刪除會迫使所有專案: The default is only v3/HTTP cache; the packages directory is closed by default, and deletion will force all projects to be restored.
strings.預設僅 wrapper dists；repository 預設關閉，刪除會迫使所: The default is only wrapper dists; the repository is turned off by default, and deletion will force all projects to re-download dependencies.
strings.預設僅建置快取與日誌；容器/映像/Volume/完整 prune 預設關閉，可能: By default, only cache and logs are built; container/image/Volume/complete prune is turned off by default, which may affect ongoing projects.
strings.預設僅清理 npm-cache；npm 本機目錄預設關閉，避免影響全域安裝: By default, only npm-cache is cleaned; npm local directory is closed by default to avoid affecting the global installation.
strings.預設關閉；修復/解除安裝部分程式可能需重新下載修補: Closed by default; repairing/uninstalling some programs may require re-downloading patches
strings.預設關閉；可能導致網站登出，請謹慎勾選: It is turned off by default; it may cause the website to log out, so please check it carefully.
strings.預設關閉；可能影響復原至舊版 Windows: Off by default; may affect reverting to older versions of Windows
strings.預設關閉；將刪除 Captures 資料夾內媒體，請先備份: Off by default; media in the Captures folder will be deleted, please back up first
strings.預設關閉；標記破壞性；依檔案大小排序: Off by default; mark as destructive; sort by file size
strings.預設關閉；非全碟深度掃描，僅常見使用者資料夾: Off by default; no full disk deep scan, only common user folders
strings.頭像與預覽可能重新下載: Avatars and previews may be re-downloaded
strings.頻道預覽可能需重新下載: Channel preview may need to be re-downloaded
strings.首次修復元件可能略慢: Repairing components may be a little slow for the first time
strings.首次啟動可能略慢: First startup may be slightly slow
strings.首次執行可能重新編譯 shader: The first execution may recompile the shader
strings.首次建置可能略慢: First build may be a little slow
strings.首次播放可能略慢: First playback may be slightly slow
strings.首次播放時間軸可能略慢: Timeline may be slightly slow on first playback
strings.首次進遊戲可能略慢: The first time you enter the game it may be a little slow
strings.首次進遊戲可能需重建著色器: You may need to rebuild the shaders when entering the game for the first time.
strings.首次開啟可能略慢: It may be a little slow to start up for the first time
strings.首次開啟可能重新產生快取: The cache may be regenerated when enabled for the first time.
strings.首次開啟專案或編輯器可能重新編譯: The project or editor may be recompiled when opening it for the first time.
strings.首次開啟文件可能略慢: Opening a file for the first time may be a little slow
strings.首次開啟部分程式可能略慢: Some programs may be a little slow when opening them for the first time.
strings.首次開啟頻道可能略慢: It may be a little slow to open the channel for the first time
strings.首次開啟頻道可能重新下載預覽: The preview may be re-downloaded when you open the channel for the first time.
strings.首次開專案可能重新編譯 shader 與快取: When starting a project for the first time, you may need to recompile the shader and cache.
strings.首次開檔可能略慢: The first opening may be a little slow
strings.首次預覽媒體可能略慢: Previewing media for the first time may be slightly slow
strings.首次顯示部分字型可能略慢: Some fonts may be slightly slower to display for the first time
strings.高效能、視覺效能優先，可關閉非必要服務，建議一般清理。: High performance and visual performance are given priority. Non-essential services can be closed. General cleaning is recommended.
strings.高效能電源、建議關閉 SysMain，建議玩家清理預設。: High-efficiency power supply, it is recommended to turn off SysMain, and players are advised to clear the defaults.
strings.高（Superfetch／SysMain，可能明顯拖慢開機與磁碟）: High (Superfetch/SysMain, may significantly slow down boot and disk)
strings.點「測試連線」或「全面測試」開始檢查網路。: Click "Test Connection" or "Full Test" to start checking the network.
strings.點「開始測速」比較 8 組公共 DNS 與自訂 DNS。: Click "Start Speed ​​Test" to compare 8 sets of public DNS and custom DNS.
strings.點卡片上的按鈕即可: Just click the button on the card
strings.點擊 Treemap 或左側檔案樹以檢視屬性: Click on the Treemap or the file tree on the left to view properties
strings.點擊區塊選取；雙擊資料夾進入: Click on the block to select; double-click on the folder to enter
strings.點擊卡片套用預設組合: Click on the card to apply the default combination
strings.點擊右側開關或卡片切換: Click the switch or card on the right to switch
strings.（大小尚未完成或無法讀取）: (Size is not complete or cannot be read)
strings.（最新一筆在上方，卡片可捲動瀏覽）: (The latest transaction is at the top, and the card can be scrolled)
strings.（此磁碟下無可列項目）: (There are no items listed under this disk)
strings.（無權限讀取此資料夾內容）: (No permission to read the contents of this folder)
strings.（無法讀取日誌檔，可能尚未建立或仍被佔用）\n: (The log file cannot be read, it may not be created yet or it may still be occupied)
strings.，建議以系統管理員執行: , it is recommended to execute it as a system administrator
